creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2009-02-08 21:49:42 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    comms                Makefile 
  Added files:
    comms/py-gammu       Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  py-gammu is a python bindings for Gammu library, which allows
  access many phones. It currently does not support all Gammu
  features, but range of covered functions is increasing, if you
  need some specific, feel free to use bug tracking system for
  feature requests.
  
  WWW:    http://cihar.com/gammu/python/
  
  PR:             ports/131330
  Submitted by:   Wen Heping <wenheping at gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.200     +1 -0      ports/comms/Makefile
  1.1       +27 -0     ports/comms/py-gammu/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/comms/py-gammu/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +7 -0      ports/comms/py-gammu/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +11 -0     ports/comms/py-gammu/pkg-plist (new)
